meta_description:
All-electric three-bedroom home near recreational lake

Located in the Sunflower at One Lake community, this net-zero, all-electric two-story home offers 2,009 square feet of living space with three bedrooms and 2.5 bathrooms. The interior features an open-concept layout including a loft, luxury vinyl plank flooring, and a kitchen equipped with quartz countertops, a center island with a sink, and stainless steel appliances with an induction range. Technological features include Energy Star qualified systems, a two-car garage pre-wired for 240V electric vehicle charging, and a home security system. Residents have access to extensive community amenities, including a 21-acre recreational lake, a clubhouse with a pool and spa, walking trails, and an on-site coffee shop. Situated approximately 1.3 miles from Vanden High School and Center Elementary, the property provides easy access to the Fairfield-Vacaville Amtrak Station for Bay Area commuting. This east-facing residence combines sustainable modern living with a low-maintenance lot and proximity to local dining and outdoor activities.
